boundary_binding.action_boundary: purchase approval matches budget and approver threshold
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact closure absent in source records
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing budget line plus approver threshold record

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record does not close the exact budget line plus approver threshold dependency, and policy requires exact source closure before execution. Escalate to resolve the missing or mismatched approval evidence, then re-evaluate against the frozen commerce boundary.
